title: Restaurant Menu
brief: Looking for a creative, vibrant, and appetizing one-page menu design for a fast-food burger restaurant named "SmashBurger".Concept: Retro, street-food style, or rustic chalkboard feel.Sections needed: Classic Burgers, Specialty Burgers, Sides, and Beverages (Just use placeholder text/prices for now).Must include space for high-quality food photos.Deliverables: High-res JPEG and print-ready PDF.
